kw.name: Set Global Variable
kw.doc: Makes a variable available globally in all tests and suites.

kw.name: Log
kw.doc: Logs the given message with the given level.

test.name: TC-NEG-04 Transfer Amount Greater Than Balance

kw.name: Open Application
Should Not Be Empty
kw.arg: Base URL must not be empty. Please set it in config/env.yaml
kw.doc: Verifies that the given item is not empty.

kw.name: Open Browser
kw.doc: Opens a new browser instance to the optional ``url``.

kw.name: Maximize Browser Window
kw.doc: Maximizes current browser window.

kw.name: Sleep
kw.doc: Pauses the test executed for the given time.
Opens the application

kw.name: Input Text
kw.doc: Types the given ``text`` into the text field identified by ``locator``.

kw.name: Input Text
kw.doc: Types the given ``text`` into the text field identified by ``locator``.

kw.name: Click Button
kw.doc: Clicks the button identified by ``locator``.

kw.name: Run Keyword And Return Status
Wait Until Page Contains
kw.doc: Waits until ``text`` appears on the current page.
Runs the given keyword with given arguments and returns the status as a Boolean value.

kw.name: Go To
kw.doc: Navigates the current browser window to the provided ``url``.

kw.name: Get Location
kw.doc: Returns the current browser window URL.

kw.name: Log To Console
kw.doc: Logs the given message to the console.

kw.name: Wait Until Element Is Visible
kw.doc: Waits until the element ``locator`` is visible.

kw.name: Click Element
kw.doc: Click the element identified by ``locator``.

kw.name: Input Text
kw.doc: Types the given ``text`` into the text field identified by ``locator``.

kw.doc: Types the given ``text`` into the text field identified by ``locator``.

kw.doc: Types the given ``text`` into the text field identified by ``locator``.

kw.doc: Types the given ``text`` into the text field identified by ``locator``.

kw.doc: Types the given ``text`` into the text field identified by ``locator``.

kw.doc: Types the given ``text`` into the text field identified by ``locator``.

kw.name: Input Text
kw.doc: Types the given ``text`` into the text field identified by ``locator``.

kw.name: Click Element
kw.doc: Click the element identified by ``locator``.

kw.name: Sleep
kw.doc: Pauses the test executed for the given time.

kw.name: Run Keyword And Return Status
Page Should Contain
kw.doc: Verifies that current page contains ``text``.
Runs the given keyword with given arguments and returns the status as a Boolean value.

kw.name: Log To Console
kw.doc: Logs the given message to the console.

kw.name: Wait Until Page Contains
kw.arg: Your account was created successfully. You are now logged in.
kw.doc: Waits until ``text`` appears on the current page.

kw.name: Log To Console
kw.doc: Logs the given message to the console.

kw.name: Submit Transfer With Amount Greater Than Balance
Click Element
kw.doc: Click the element identified by ``locator``.

kw.name: Wait Until Page Contains
kw.doc: Waits until ``text`` appears on the current page.

kw.name: Wait Until Page Contains Element
kw.doc: Waits until the element ``locator`` appears on the current page.

kw.name: Wait Until Page Contains Element
kw.doc: Waits until the element ``locator`` appears on the current page.

kw.name: Wait Until Keyword Succeeds
Get List Items
kw.doc: Returns all labels or values of selection list ``locator``.

kw.name: Log To Console
kw.doc: Logs the given message to the console.

kw.name: Should Not Be Empty
kw.doc: Verifies that the given item is not empty.
Runs the specified keyword and retries if it fails.

kw.name: Input Text
kw.doc: Types the given ``text`` into the text field identified by ``locator``.

kw.name: Select From List By Index
kw.doc: Selects options from selection list ``locator`` by ``indexes``.

kw.name: Select From List By Index
kw.doc: Selects options from selection list ``locator`` by ``indexes``.

kw.name: Click Element
kw.doc: Click the element identified by ``locator``.

kw.name: Log To Console
kw.arg: Submitted transfer with amount 999999 (way above balance)
kw.doc: Logs the given message to the console.

kw.name: Sleep
kw.doc: Pauses the test executed for the given time.

kw.name: Page Should Not Contain
kw.doc: Verifies the current page does not contain ``text``.

kw.name: Log To Console
kw.doc: Logs the given message to the console.

kw.name: Close Application
Close All Browsers
kw.doc: Closes all open browsers and resets the browser cache.
Closing the application

test.status: User interrupted Pabot execution (Ctrl+C) when this test/suite was running. Unfortunately, there is no original data available.
